name: Web Search
author: itz-mune
description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo — no API key required.
long_description: Adds a `web_search` tool that queries DuckDuckGo and returns the top results. No API key required. Works with any LLM that supports tool use.

changelog.1.0.1: Fix: updated DuckDuckGo import from duckduckgo-search to ddgs (package renamed).

config_fields.label: Max results
config_fields.help: Number of results to return per query (default: 5).
